summary: Tested the new global search feature across Contacts, Groups, and Blast Templates plus xlsx exports. 17/17 backend pytest tests pass: blast-templates search by name/message/attachment_name, empty-query returns all, special regex chars (e.g. 'Special+Char.Test') correctly handled by re.escape, Hindi unicode search works, no-match returns empty list. Contacts and Groups search regression OK. Contacts and leads xlsx exports return valid (PK-magic) zip files. Frontend E2E (mobile viewport): logged in via stub OTP, /blast-templates page renders with data-testid=tpl-search, debounced 250ms, fires GET /api/blast-templates?q=Diwali on type, list correctly filters (Diwali shown, Cables Promo hidden), special+char query also filters correctly. Contacts and Groups search bars still work. Contacts Export button triggers download of contacts.xlsx.

minor.issue: q is passed unescaped into MongoDB $regex; if user enters '+' or '(' the regex may behave unexpectedly. Blast-templates uses re.escape(q) — recommend same in /api/contacts and /api/groups for consistency. Not blocking.
Same as above — q goes raw into $regex without re.escape.

action_items: (Optional) Apply re.escape(q) in /api/contacts and /api/groups list endpoints for parity with /api/blast-templates and to prevent surprise regex behaviour with user input.

Note for main agent: review_request mentioned route /templates but actual route is /blast-templates (App.js:48). If uniform UX is wanted, consider aliasing or updating navigation labels — not a bug, just a discrepancy in the brief.
critical_code_review_comments: /api/blast-templates correctly uses re.escape(q) — good. /api/contacts and /api/groups don't, creating inconsistent regex semantics across the 3 search endpoints.
server.py is now ~1300 lines and growing — should be split into routers (auth, contacts, groups, blast_templates, broadcast, bot, whatsapp) for maintainability.
Most endpoints still bypass require_auth dependency including the new search endpoints — single-owner MVP scope but flag for future.
test_credentials: Stub OTP login: any phone (e.g. 9876500099). Dev OTP shown on login screen and returned by POST /api/auth/send-otp.
seed_data_creation: Test fixtures create 5 TEST_ blast templates (Diwali Offer, Cables Promo, Switches Combo, Special+Char.Test, Hindi template), 2 TEST_ contacts (Surat/Mumbai), 2 TEST_ groups; all auto-cleaned in fixture teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The route for blast templates is /blast-templates NOT /templates (App.js line 48). New backend test file /app/backend/tests/test_search_export.py covers global search regression for all 3 modules and xlsx exports. Existing /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py from iteration 1 covers full bot flow. Use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. Backend escape inconsistency (only blast-templates uses re.escape) is documented as minor — fix is one-line in /api/contacts and /api/groups handlers if desired.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. Both backend and frontend search + export functionality work as specified.
